generated_assessment.reasoning: The profile's extremely high Openness to Experience (81st pct) and low Extraversion (4th pct) make it receptive to novel, detailed counter-arguments encountered in sustained multi-agent conversation loops, while its stable Neuroticism (35th pct) and very high Conscientiousness (77th pct) suggest careful deliberation rather than emotional override; the ALIGNED baseline (-183) means the T4 orchestrated campaign primarily reinforces and deepens existing skepticism, producing a modest 56-point negative shift consistent with confirmatory exposure over weeks.
